Diospyros attenuata is a tree in the Ebony family endemic to Sri Lanka where it is known as Kadumberiya or Kaluvaella in Sinhala language.  

Paragraph 4  
Cryptantha nevadensis is a species of wildflower in the borage family known by the common names Nevada catseye and Nevada forget-me-not.
